apps.name: 7-Zip
apps.summary: Open-source file archiver with a high compression ratio, supporting 7z, ZIP, RAR extraction, TAR, GZip and many more formats.

apps.name: PeaZip
apps.summary: Free, open-source archive manager that creates and extracts 7z, ZIP, TAR, RAR, ZPAQ and 200+ archive formats with strong encryption.

apps.name: WizTree
apps.summary: Fast disk space analyzer that scans drives via the MFT to show which files and folders use the most space as an interactive tree map.

apps.name: Disk Usage Analyzer
apps.summary: GNOME tool (baobab) that scans folders and drives and shows storage usage as ring or treemap charts to find what consumes disk space.

apps.name: CPU-Z
apps.summary: Freeware utility that reports detailed information on the processor, motherboard, chipset, memory modules and SPD, with a benchmark.

apps.name: HWiNFO
apps.summary: Comprehensive freeware hardware analysis, monitoring and reporting tool covering sensors, temperatures, voltages, fans and clocks.

apps.name: CrystalDiskInfo
apps.summary: Open-source HDD/SSD health monitor that reads S.M.A.R.T. attributes, temperature and status for SATA, NVMe, USB and RAID drives.

apps.name: BleachBit
apps.summary: Free, open-source disk cleaner and privacy tool that removes cache, cookies, history, temporary files and logs to free space.

apps.name: GParted
apps.summary: Free GNOME partition editor for graphically creating, resizing, moving, deleting and checking disk partitions and file systems.

apps.name: Mission Center
apps.summary: Modern GTK4 system monitor showing CPU, memory, disk, network and GPU usage with a per-app and per-process breakdown.
